title: Serratula gnaphaloides
taxonomy: Serratula gnaphaloides is classified under the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. This classification places it within the order Asterales. As a member of the Asteraceae family, Serratula gnaphaloides is closely related to other flowering plants such as daisies, sunflowers, and zinnias. The family Asteraceae is further divided into several subfamilies and tribes, with Serratula gnaphaloides belonging to a specific tribe within the subfamily Carduoideae. Serratula gnaphaloides's classification helps in understanding its evolutionary relationships with other plant species.
